author: denmojo
description: Marks unopened notes with a blue dot in the file explorer. Auto-clears the moment the note is opened. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Dennis Mojado
manifest.description: Marks unopened notes with a blue dot in the file explorer and rolls the dot up to parent folders. Auto-clears the moment the note is opened.
manifest.name: Unread Dot

name: Unread Dot

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description: Folder dot rollup: a folder inherits the blue dot when any descendant file is unread, so a collapsed subtree still shows that something inside is unread. Adds a folder right-click "Mark all in folder as read" (recursive) that reports how many notes it cleared. The orange modified-file indicator from the 1.2.x betas is intentionally not included.

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description:
Beta release for BRAT testing.

## New
- **Folder dot rollup**: folders inherit a blue (unread) or orange (modified) dot when any descendant file has one. Blue takes precedence over orange, matching file behavior. Lets you collapse subtrees and still see that something underneath needs attention.

Click-to-clear remains file-only. Use the folder context-menu **Mark all in folder as read** to clear a subtree.

## Carried from 1.2.0-beta.1
- Folder context-menu: **Mark all in folder as read** clears blue and orange dots for every descendant file recursively.

## Carried from 1.1.0-beta.1
- Orange dot for externally modified files (distinct from blue unread dot).
- Modify events for files open in any leaf are ignored.
- Opening a file or 'Mark as read' clears both states.

## Install via BRAT
Add beta plugin: `denmojo/obsidian-unread-dot`
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta.2

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description:
Beta release for BRAT testing.

## New
- Folder context-menu: **Mark all in folder as read** clears both blue (unread) and orange (modified) dots for every file under the folder, recursively.

## Carried from 1.1.0-beta.1
- Orange dot for externally modified files (distinct from blue unread dot).
- Modify events for files open in any leaf are ignored.
- Opening a file or 'Mark as read' clears both states.

## Install via BRAT
Add beta plugin: `denmojo/obsidian-unread-dot`
releases.name: 1.2.0-beta.1

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description:
Beta release for BRAT testing while 1.0.1 is still under community-plugins review.

## New
- Externally modified files now get an **orange dot** in the file explorer, distinct from the blue unread dot for new files.
- Modify events for files currently open in any Obsidian leaf are ignored, so your own typing never triggers the dot.
- Opening a file or right-click "Mark as read" clears both states.

## Install via BRAT
Add beta plugin: \`denmojo/obsidian-unread-dot\`
releases.name: 1.1.0-beta.1 (beta)

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description:
Compliance fixes for Obsidian community plugin submission.

- Remove top-level heading from settings tab.
- Normalize user-supplied path prefixes.
- Tighten prefix matching.

No behavior changes for end users.

releases.author: denmojo
releases.description:
Initial release.

Marks newly created files with a blue dot in the file explorer. The dot clears the moment you click the file in the explorer or open it in a tab.

Features:
- Tracks any file extension by default; configurable extension and path-prefix ignore lists.
- Right-click any file in the explorer to toggle unread state.
- Commands: Mark all notes as read, Mark current note as unread.
- State persists across restarts.
- Existing files in the vault at install time are treated as already read.

Install: drop main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css into .obsidian/plugins/unread-dot/ in your vault, then enable in Settings -> Community plugins.
